case_title: SYNCHRONY BANK VS. RENEE LUCKEY ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK AS TO DEFENDANT LUCKEY, RENEE DOES 1 TO 15 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-11-2017
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-31-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF HEARING (TRANSACTION ID # 17317019) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 18008020)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-31-2017 CONTINUED TO APR-03-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE OCT-31-2017 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL (TRANSACTION ID # 17317019) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 17291005), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK SERVED OCT-16-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE OCT-17-2017 AS TO DEFENDANT LUCKEY, RENEE
DECLARATION IN RESPONSE TO THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 17298039) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-03-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
